title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
